untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation and comparison of straddle option prices (near-term vs longer-term), which are derivatives instruments not representable in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators are limited to price action (OHLCV), technical overlays (moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots), and volume metrics. Straddle pricing requires options data and volatility surface calculations that are not available in this indicator library.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_151 is an options-based pattern filter from McMillan's trading methodology. It uses the ratio of straddle prices across different expiration dates to identify high-probability setups. This requires access to options chains and pricing data, not equity price action alone. To implement this signal, the backtest engine would need to be extended with options pricing indicators such as straddle_price_near_term and straddle_price_long_term.
